subject: 2.5 Million Georgians Have Voted
body:
All Eyes On Georgia | | | [**View this email in your browser**](https://mailchi.mp/momsinoffice/11-million-georgians-have-voted-747560?e=3f151f8b74)
---
# 2.5 million Georgians have cast their vote...
My Friend,What we have accomplished this year is nothing short of historic, but this fight is not over yet. Not until we flip the Senate blue. We can still win this, but not without your support helping us make sure that every single Georgian has a fair chance to cast their vote on January 5th. This runoff election is extraordinary—the outcome of these two races will determine control of the U.S. Senate. Winning these two seats will mean that Joe Biden will work with a Senate dedicated to putting working families first.
**I am asking you directly.**
Grassroots donations like yours will be the decisive factor in these upcoming races. We are in the homestretch and grassroots organizations are counting on you to get us to the finish line. **If we want to win this fight, we need the same historic turnout for Democrats that we saw in the November election.** Working families across the country are struggling today to provide food, shelter and basic needs for their children and the GOP controlled Senate continues to block the bill to give Americans $2,000 stimulus checks and a chance to survive this pandemic. The inaction will continue unless we win these two races in Georgia and flip the Senate. **Republicans only have one advantage—voter suppression.**[**Help me**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=72dc3d8f3f&e=3f151f8b74) and Moms in Office support Fair Fight Action so that we can achieve historic voter turnout and win these two races on January 5th. It is absolutely essential that all organizations helping our efforts with voter turnout have the resources they need ahead of the fundraising deadline TONIGHT at midnight. [**December 31st**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=6dabf99fd5&e=3f151f8b74) marks the final FEC deadline of 2020 and the outcome of the next few days will determine control of the Senate for the next 2 years. I know that I am asking a lot, but there is too much at stake. I am coming to you directly because a donation in any amount will have a huge impact on the outcome of this election and on the future of our country. Help me and Moms for Fair Fight [**support**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=52640f570e&e=3f151f8b74) Stacey Abrams’ heroic efforts to ensure that every Georgian gets a fair chance to vote.Thank you,Simona Grace Founder of Moms in Office
| [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1305e5fd50&e=3f151f8b74)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20in=20Office?=
subject: FWD: It's Because of You
body:
We have accomplished a lot this year thanks to your generous support. | | | [**View this email in your browser**](https://mailchi.mp/momsinoffice/11-million-georgians-have-voted-747556?e=3f151f8b74)
---
# So proud of this...
My Friend,It is not that hard to raise $50k for many wealthy candidates or PACs run by political insiders and power brokers. They can just pick up the phone to call 10 or so of their wealthy friends and big checks start rolling in immediately.As a single mom, an immigrant, a graduate of a public university, I don’t have that option because my rollerdex does not include millionaires. So, when I need to raise funds to meet our deadlines and find the resources that we need to continue our work in politics, **I come to you**.
**My rollerdex is made up of people just like you and me.**
Hard-working **Americans** who believe in activism and **making a change** through the power of our collective voice.**Single moms** and families who are making great sacrifices each and every day to be there for their children while holding down a job without childcare.Friends, family and **supporters** who have been my cheerleaders this year and believed in me even at times when I doubted myself.**** No dinner parties. No celebrity fundraisers. No Wall Street types. Just people like you and me who had an extra $20 to give. I am so proud of the 1,000+ small dollar donors who truly made our grassroots movement one of the only people powered PACs helping to elect women and moms in the country.This year we have provided grants and endorsements to over 20 candidates running for office and raised close to $40k from thousands of small dollar donors with an average donation of just $30. This is quite an accomplishment and I am deeply grateful that you have helped power our movement.Today, I am coming to you because I don’t have any wealthy friends to call before the clock strikes midnight and our FEC deadline is just a few hours away.****[**December 31st**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b69344f3cf&e=3f151f8b74)is the most important deadline for us to meet as it will decide what we can and can not do next year. As the founder and president of Moms in Office PAC it is my job to make sure that our organization and team has the resources that we need to continue on with our work to change the American political landscape. **Can I count on you to help us meet our end of the year goal?** We need to stretch every dollar to make sure that our mission continues in 2021 and every single [**donation**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=7a7453c032&e=3f151f8b74)in any amount makes a difference for us.Do you know how many times I have been told that what I set out to do is not possible to accomplish for someone like me? A single mom, an immigrant, an everyday hard-working American without access to a wealthy network and power. Countless of times. I have seen women running for office all across the country experience this.**This is what we set out to change**. **This is what we will continue to challenge.** I tell myself everyday that I need to lead by example if I want to help other women who are not independently wealthy and if I want to give them courage. So, the fact that I don’t fit in a box, I wear that as a badge of honor because it’s what helps others to believe in themselves. It helps them believe that they too have a place in American politics.Thank you for the courage that you give me to lead by example by supporting Moms in Office. Here is to a happy and healthy New Year! Thank you,Simona Grace Founder of Moms in Office
| [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1ab85b2a86&e=3f151f8b74)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: If you remember one thing for 2021…
body:
As we begin 2021, I have some thoughts I’d like to share with you. 2020 was hard, no doubt about it. Our nation has been through a rough year, and we aren’t at the end of the challenges and obstacles yet. But, you know what? _**“You just can’t beat the person who never gives up.” – Babe Ruth**_ That’s really all there is to it! We just don’t give up, period. Another way to say it is like this, from Thomas Edison: _**“Our greatest weakness lies in giving up. The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.”**_ One more time, and then one more time again, and again... I can’t help but feel optimistic knowing that we aren’t going to just throw up our hands and give up. We aren’t going to give up on America, on truth, on our Constitution, or on each other. It doesn’t mean things will be easy, or happen quickly, or that there won’t be setbacks along the way. What it does mean though, is that we will stay the course, no matter what, and we will never bend. So, please join me in celebrating this new year and the new opportunities we will have together to fight for what is right, as well as for future generations of America! Happy New Year! Jenny Beth Martin | |
---

body:
# [#]
Happy New Year!
Hi Peter!

2021 is a new year filled with fresh starts, new resolutions, a new administration, and a year full of hope.

While 2020 will go down in history, let’s make 2021 a year worth remembering. This is the year we will take progressive leaps to help our nation. Our new administration will be stronger than ever and will help end the Coronavirus, create more jobs across the country, work to combat climate change, and much more.

Although we have a lot of work to do in 2021, today is a day for celebration! Thank you for continuing to do your part to end the Coronavirus, thank you for helping us elect Joe Biden as the next President of the United States, and thank you for being so dedicated to helping our nation progress towards a better future. We couldn’t do it without you.

I hope you have a Happy New Year!

Thank you for your continued support,

Mike Thompson

subject: Happy New Year 2021
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/017daf5d8113/happy-new-year-2021?e=9f843ba602)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

2020 was a year filled with unprecedented challenges for all New Yorkers. Whether you are a small business owner struggling to keep your doors open, a mother or father who was laid off due to prolonged shutdowns, or an essential worker reporting to the frontlines day in and day out– there is not one aspect of our society that wasn’t impacted by the COVID-19 pandemic.

The good news is there’s hope on the horizon. But I know there is still a lot of fear and uncertainty about what the future holds, and the long-term social and economic impacts of what we’ve been through this past year are tremendous.

As we head into a new year, I’m energized to return to Albany and get back to work on behalf of all New Yorkers. Working with my Republican colleagues we are ready to hit the restart button. Now is the time to provide help for struggling small businesses, rebuild our economy, provide opportunities for our workforce, and to make smart investments to rebuild a stronger, healthier New York.

As hard as I will fight to help us recover, I need your committed support. Our conference needs New Yorkers like you to join us in the fight against bad policies that will inflict further damage and make recovery more difficult. As New Yorkers, we are all in this together, and as we work to fix the course of our state, I want you to know how grateful I am to have you by my side in this New Year.

Happy New Year -- here is to brighter days ahead for all New Yorkers.

Your Senator,
Rob

[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=610dba503a8d4119a18167a7d9dd00c8&_e=fyeeAprhVIMYWXx6w0Y9K1WGmHvyffK6Z7VIjk_ZwWSlSf_yGxLqT-W4ueEG5hSzuWNiXc5iqnso57fUwKAHQdWs1GXtNPutAJ7HvxeosBA1DRoZ9kIF5xdQrnuMOVTZLiT8LVTkSGkI_J_SyStImPatvkPQ4mRkdCYyqStVO6JImJoAiQzX2eUvs6Y_KpdwiX-UsQwTHnnVCeEyo8dWsYTTBY9o_g_Eo72JYw33bb1GYgSZtJgNiYR3xvQ4MXfkIl1eyVmABJhUNg9qvYxiz6UIiear3eVAX5hZbjy5Y6I%3D) **Why I Voted No 🐽** I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again. **Congress is dysfunctional**. We had months to draft and debate a stimulus bill to help people in need, but Nancy Pelosi refused. Instead, Congress attached the stimulus bill to a last-minute government spending bill filled to the brim with [pork projects](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=610dba503a8d4119a18167a7d9dd00c8&_e=fyeeAprhVIMYWXx6w0Y9K0AqNR3Gc3nnRMPry--rylRQbOyjR7F8nUpczBZzc8ja7ZhPNRdAt83-hEiYNiOOU-nRjN9jIdlbbUgrr7JDRlLDgiLPq3sWN9OkusacYUZ_iNL0qp7QglCusKBeV9wZpTPeDY8ah2EggPwH6UDbGYibE5mxbgDcSJM92qvrVfnyKxi4ljySVpxbz6yvsdtsIbh_x3r4HUJPgaLkfG0VEXfRlxKK2QbU6dHo_FyhwO-811XzoGlmi5gLKmKfSpjr_urLQHkk_tO5YjI_XQu8df8p77c3PocBMgdajLoYRMe6uN4nsY4brFVqN3GhXOEA0g%3D%3D), and gave members only five hours to read the 5,600-page monstrosity. Here are some examples.
* $10 million for gender programs in Pakistan.
* Money for a study of the Springfield Race Riot that occurred in 1908.
* $40 million for the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts (which already received $25 million in the first COVID stimulus bill).

**People are hurting and they deserve help, but sending millions of dollars to foreign countries for pork projects doesn’t help the American people**. Tennesseans didn’t send me to Washington to rubber stamp the status quo. Congress must be forced to reform its ways or it will only get worse. | |

**Nashville Police are Heroes 🚔**
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=610dba503a8d4119a18167a7d9dd00c8&_e=fyeeAprhVIMYWXx6w0Y9K-Xk_pMx4snnjAnK1EFtDsH72dgfUagpIJDeqUV8lSq8RBSdh9k5Q1fduWZ5UChwEHr1Ur9JKW_8HUG2r1IUvbi_TnZoRBmVb-20U7rglz7f4B9sx-YbQ1CBaIrV_Ik1NCpTvV2okZljVUaLif3UkVig1Kccr8AoyCJGI7a3IFNBb5vTwMCVgoCJxmkj2z2dRSuMq3nSvIwgA9DIwcbuwhKbZgG9uIUCzarVBXw5OoeqvY9dQYCWqJL2oxQkKJF6udA39urb0SL5rgmlWqmLh6Y%3D)
The Christmas bombing in Nashville was a horrible event, and my prayers go out to the injured. But we should also remember how fortunate we are. **Many lives were saved thanks to the police officers who went door-to-door and evacuated the area**.

Their heroism is a reminder that the men and women in law enforcement put on the badge every day and risk their lives to keep us safe. Last spring, Nashville liberals [led the charge](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=610dba503a8d4119a18167a7d9dd00c8&_e=fyeeAprhVIMYWXx6w0Y9K3VSqRHDwzplrKLb9p59dIL_oIDg34bEWIhKnO8hAXBhH6uXBA_3W7VVI1wKi2sHqJc4IjxvZWjucOeOyci_rMtDIFDG6uKkK7fIgO7YkmCfIuPenXdCEl26Jbex83ymoSZt1qrjLdyjjsW9XR_KR1sOmYGkTamfclIFJhi-azx_NGuUmeG1izRsm10A0oQD-geV2n-pvWMbuavYYci932GVN3jj3wGzT5SN1LlH7RPlV4ee_JSwsW8WrZQB9tlbcmfVgDpVumYtf14bFMrNHP6oNz8x6hj9UOePjPWvHofrncr_veqE62P1qQmX1XwWRM4QUcoOd4oygohvh-ByI50FAqPe_GcKIdvTSxmPDftT) to “defund the police.” Thankfully, the Metro Council did not listen. But as the defund movement continues around the country, the Nashville attack should serve as a reminder of how dangerous and radical the movement is.

_**“I will bless those who bless you [Israel]” – Genesis 12:3**_
The Trump family blessed Israel. God blessed the Trump family.

In the 1950s, Donald Trump’s father sheltered Holocaust survivors who escaped NAZI Germany for America. The Trump family continued to support Israel throughout the years – receiving the prestigious **“Tree of Life”** award.

Donald Trump was blessed. His first job in politics – was President of the United States.

**Now they want to take that away.**

Don’t let them take away your vote. Don’t let them take away your country.

Bless Israel and you will be blessed. [Plant a tree in the Promised Land](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDAxLTExZWZmZTFjODIwYTRkODViNjZhMWMzNDUzNDcwMjdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaXNyYWVsdHJlZXMub3JnL3RydW1wLz9taWQ9NDMyMTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=o_u_7Ls89p7hSeHmHfBL2w) – and God will keep his promise to **you**.

_The forces of evil may steal this election, steal your vote, and try to steal your country. But one thing is certain. God's word will stand. His Promised Land will endure. A tree planted in Israel will grow tall, strong – and it will endure. _

**Because God’s promise is the one thing you can count on.**

Donald Trump’s father blessed Israel – and his son was blessed to become President of the United States.

[Plant a tree in Israel – the Promised Land – and secure your blessings now](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDAxLTExZWZmZTFjODIwYTRkODViNjZhMWMzNDUzNDcwMjdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaXNyYWVsdHJlZXMub3JnL3RydW1wLz9taWQ9NDMyMTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Q0ZjaE48pGuqKj7FGgJ4ww).
A tree will be planted in Israel – **IN YOUR NAME. **

Trump.
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDAxLTExZWZmZTFjODIwYTRkODViNjZhMWMzNDUzNDcwMjdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaXNyYWVsdHJlZXMub3JnL3RydW1wLz9taWQ9NDMyMTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=7qkUuDyyEq-mn_Hw4MFY6A)
You will receive an official certificate **– IN YOUR NAME.**
Your tree will be planted by the internationally-recognized IsraelTrees / Lo Artzeinu organization, **which has planted more fruit trees in Israel than any other organization** since it was founded nearly 30 years ago in 1993.
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDAxLTExZWZmZTFjODIwYTRkODViNjZhMWMzNDUzNDcwMjdl%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaXNyYWVsdHJlZXMub3JnL3RydW1wLz9taWQ9NDMyMTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=mSw0HPFTh3_WW_uFSJ3pKw)
Your tree will be planted by the internationally-recognized IsraelTrees / Lo Artzeinu organization, which has **planted more fruit trees in Israel than any other organization** since it was founded nearly 30 years ago in 1993.

**[Secure your blessing. I asked my friend, Cliff Maloney, if I could share this secret with you. **Allow me to introduce Cliff before I share this information. **
* Cliff Maloney served as the Youth Director on my 2016 Presidential campaign, and has since become a great friend of mine. He now serves as the President of Young Americans for Liberty.

* Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is the most active and effective youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American electoral politics. Their four-step mission is to identify, educate, train, and mobilize youth activists to Make Liberty Win.

Now let me tell you how Cliff Maloney and Young Americans for Liberty WON 120 down ballot elections this November 3rd, how they are defeating socialism on college campuses and in state legislatures across the country, and how they crushed hundreds of establishment and radical Progressives.

**First:** Young Americans for Liberty recruited THOUSANDS of college students from across the country to take action for the ideas of liberty.

**Second:** YAL taught these students about the principles of freedom, and trained them to knock doors, persuade voters, and win elections.

**Third:** Cliff mobilized hundreds of student door knockers to knock on 1,400,986 doors this election cycle to secure victory for hardcore liberty candidates who believe in the Constitution, draining the swamp, and the ideas of liberty. Young Americans for Liberty proceeded to WIN 120 down ballot elections this year in key states across the country.

Since 2018, YAL has helped elect **176 pro-freedom candidates to office.**

YAL's plan is called, "Operation Win at the Door" and their goal is to elect 250 HARDCORE liberty candidates to office by 2022. **I personally believe YAL 's youth army is one of our Republic's greatest chances to restore the Constitution, defeat socialism, and take back our country from the radical left. **

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fc2e43b7458f/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-67491?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|

|

| Friends,
We’re in the home stretch of the high-stakes runoff here in Georgia. Republicans across the state are getting out the vote, and **we’re on the path to victory.**
Senator Perdue joined Julie Banderas on Fox News this afternoon to discuss the final days of the race, Jon Ossoff’s continued refusal to answer about his concerning ties to China, and additional COVID relief.
Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=87732ea937&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the full segment.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7e224b8eef&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **HIGHLIGHTS** **On Following His Doctor's Recommendation to Quarantine ** _"My wife and I are doing just fine, we tested negative... We had someone test positive yesterday morning, and according to CDC guidelines and our doctor's recommendations, with an abundance of caution, we have decided to go into quarantine these last few days. It's terrible timing, but we are not going to miss a step. We're going to participate in all these events as if I were there... We washed our hands, watched our distance, and we've been wearing masks, following all the protocols. This is just part of the year we've been in._ _"I want to go back to what I heard that my opponent just said, he defined the problem but he has never offered a solution for this COVID crisis. As a matter of fact, when he was pushed on it in a debate, by himself, he said, 'I don't want to get bogged into the details.' As a matter of fact, we were in the details providing $47 billion for our state which saved a million and a half jobs, he opposed it at the same time his father took a loan to save his business. The Democrats don't want to talk about the issues. They are really all about hiding the agenda they are trying to perpetrate, and distracting voters from the real issues."_ **On Additional COVID Relief for Georgians** _"First of all, this should have been done back in September... Some $15 billion in the PPP program came to Georgia, and as I said, saved 1.5 million jobs here. We knew that in the fall we would need more help, tried to get it, and the Democrats blocked it several times going into the presidential election. They didn't want to give President Trump a win. Now we've been pushing in the last two months, we finally got a compromise. Certainly we need more help than the $600. The $2,000, I fully support, the President's right."_ **On Ossoff's China Problem** _"He is a serious reporter, that's why the question needs to be asked. But it's not asked by any of the liberal media that's out there. It's amazing to me that you can have the Eric Swalwell crisis, the Hunter Biden crisis, and ignore the Jon Ossoff crisis. This is clearly a pattern of activity from the Chinese Communist Party. They identified Jon Ossoff -- after his 2017 attempt to run for the U.S. House and lost -- they identified him as an ambitious young politician on the Democratic side that they probably could get influence. So they hired him and he worked for two years for this propaganda company, the Chinese Communist Party, Julie, and he hid it from the people of Georgia during his primary. He might not have won that primary had he fully disclosed that. He got caught, he then disclosed it, lied about it and lied about it again, and he still didn't answer Peter's question. If you notice that, he never has an answer to that question."_ **Thank you for helping us hold the line. Get out and vote on January 5!** \- Team Perdue

subject: Here’s how we can wipe out socialism in our schools
body:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8e8533f015a14ca9bb1e48f0fe4df923&_e=2saqawHyGZ--c2m_hc7n-bdN4skY6FdnhbR8BPRW83r8mPZqGWb-5UWYwtVGwCFXGo3p7ASxkpU2TC_IDj9ZUbTexrpLs8S93TafXPcpxWzNRX9A8t8GY_fU1n9AdxVNR1YyfCw7JYTn0Goas_JrtQhI0ttI5htlMhkq5eBY5nr5ca3PgyBZhDLlYg3oZu3uPuzRMptiojh85o-Q_zRDqK0oSU7Sv8D_rL63NbSM_pPpaOk2u5VZU6rw2KjqzOjhcfd5yojBxiM2us2hUIDnsjSK5X4FRiRE67gbvYqlklkev546BtyXMXTkzhxf0UHaozEZcWMsNe3rKuoOxxy8K_qSDA26j6Z1QeGbdHwUi8nToJEurKFH0qL7yIFjzmxr_HOuz47lQr2eltuZsh36u1bjX6N_SRnyzx_DffJmWoHN55enrPqlhaGd35vqBDWC)

Peter,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children’s books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. _He is on a mission to distribute an additional 100,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries_.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8e8533f015a14ca9bb1e48f0fe4df923&_e=2saqawHyGZ--c2m_hc7n-bdN4skY6FdnhbR8BPRW83r8mPZqGWb-5UWYwtVGwCFXGo3p7ASxkpU2TC_IDj9ZUbTexrpLs8S93TafXPcpxWzNRX9A8t8GY_fU1n9AdxVNR1YyfCw7JYTn0Goas_JrtQhI0ttI5htlMhkq5eBY5nr5ca3PgyBZhDLlYg3oZu3uPuzRMptiojh85o-Q_zRDqK0oSU7Sv8D_rL63NbSM_pPZ8Wo2D-q5GoL9V6hfXhGw16RMQV813VePnkjQtgGMXNuTMV38ggi5DqPc_ZrIi9iDhULvLIZrPwb484wPcRIT-2rIzrS3zMkPTFCiWNOw0e2wn3EJHjGFy_6eVnMidzqa1-OTJxOBbTwRP5_DUgWJebZaw3eOMm2560KUDMVVe_6_5VAg1j1E3EPD-AhyR_XbycwCXNtFF0OIbmZ6R7rC)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 1.5 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country.**

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 100,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8e8533f015a14ca9bb1e48f0fe4df923&_e=2saqawHyGZ--c2m_hc7n-bdN4skY6FdnhbR8BPRW83r8mPZqGWb-5UWYwtVGwCFXGo3p7ASxkpU2TC_IDj9ZUbTexrpLs8S93TafXPcpxWzNRX9A8t8GY_fU1n9AdxVNR1YyfCw7JYTn0Goas_JrtQhI0ttI5htlMhkq5eBY5nr5ca3PgyBZhDLlYg3oZu3uPuzRMptiojh85o-Q_zRDqK0oSU7Sv8D_rL63NbSM_pOMen3_4dqDD8uQ-2RQ1Vch2CeQdKZmTnkflgCt6dCSmsOc_UGI-Wh00_ZtK8sBrDCrmJKM8b4NjdGqjADPxTjeQFZGQysLwYjlVpShRc6rB_N3A9LtgBJOCQR6HYqafUcitXK6VOb6HgTXEKOgQjKKWu_rqCCo6A5GmjjibDuhmXkkG6jT2aidPSj9DBwK6Eudy-gkCt1cVHwlMfXIDESp)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8e8533f015a14ca9bb1e48f0fe4df923&_e=2saqawHyGZ--c2m_hc7n-bdN4skY6FdnhbR8BPRW83r8mPZqGWb-5UWYwtVGwCFXGo3p7ASxkpU2TC_IDj9ZUbTexrpLs8S93TafXPcpxWzNRX9A8t8GY_fU1n9AdxVNR1YyfCw7JYTn0Goas_JrtQhI0ttI5htlMhkq5eBY5nr5ca3PgyBZhDLlYg3oZu3uPuzRMptiojh85o-Q_zRDqK0oSU7Sv8D_rL63NbSM_pP9DvTWpD1hNzsmIJDLXTWWNi785qpA7IOu7bakE3Qi4Wlo8XUxQmRPXH8TxZAlPr2MAZN7B84D6tBOKxn4WOjWT8r5tUOLwhZ8UU0mCoZpusX-7aW2J9C_M7UgKVaNt9xnGQTCyPjEFlkBnl78vUDmv2M1CYQ1uYAG_cuXeseaWbMxOoSdigh7X25H9M-Dj8apsE4Svlg3uBVQfdckMj8G)

**The reality is neither Donald Trump, Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.[_Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child_! ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8e8533f015a14ca9bb1e48f0fe4df923&_e=2saqawHyGZ--c2m_hc7n-bdN4skY6FdnhbR8BPRW83r8mPZqGWb-5UWYwtVGwCFXGo3p7ASxkpU2TC_IDj9ZUbTexrpLs8S93TafXPcpxWzNRX9A8t8GY_fU1n9AdxVNR1YyfCw7JYTn0Goas_JrtQhI0ttI5htlMhkq5eBY5nr5ca3PgyBZhDLlYg3oZu3uPuzRMptiojh85o-Q_zRDqK0oSU7Sv8D_rL63NbSM_pOnSavBt49kW5DfwquZgG6Efto9-47ikSEYPaQExOm97IiaSs2OfKpdgsw39uVjKkKS2KlbaoqxBSlVHcPwSLGsagHCbKAMK2xzZp1Y0SglAJDTQ2QqA90agUEH-el5hRH-W2m7JwOxrj85dSCO4R3bn1XdktRyvOIM-9opoCzb2JjywrCpmvCy4_PiVXapUr0TrVKfeYHsuh5bUCD_XgoR)**

***PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute’s biggest supporters, John Pestana. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John Pestana will personally match it with another $100 gift.***
